title: possibility of more column information in the header of the updatefield (now a lot of empty space)

posts.author: mnigten (Michael Nigten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I would like to see more information in the header of the update field where the first column is named.
It would be a good thing that it is possible with for instance a checkbox what column information will be added. this makes it more readable on smaller screens.
